overview: Bubba's 33 Roadie Training — a staff learning hub covering New Store Opening tasks, per-position training and certification, a shared Library of categories and items, and a Be Legendary practice mode with quizzes and flashcards, anchored by a cinematic patriotic hero banner.
features: New Store Opening task tracker with per-position checklists
Shared Library of categories and items with admin management
Be Legendary practice mode with quizzes and flashcards
Cinematic patriotic Be Legendary hero banner
Admin tools for users, positions, library, and content
